F-r2-block-1_Wen_non_Abelian_at_sec_2.1.verification: F line 176-178 sec 2.1 falsified-register entry now reads: 'the Wen--ADW factor-$6000$ deficit closing the emergent-$U(1)$-string-net-extended-to-gravity channel of Wen (D3 \S 4)'. Both errors corrected: (a) channel attribution flipped from 'emergent-non-Abelian-gauge-symmetry pathway' to 'emergent-$U(1)$-string-net-extended-to-gravity channel of Wen', matching F sec 6.2 line 894-895 closure derivation; (b) D3 section reference flipped from '(D3 sec:gauge-erasure)' to '(D3 \S 4)', matching D3 paper_draft.tex line 418-436 'Perturbative Wen-ADW deficit' location and matching the F sec 6.2 paragraph header at line 895 ('Closure 2: Perturbative Wen-ADW deficit (D3 \S 4)'). Phrasing consistent with the round-2-corrected sec 10.2 entry at line 1671-1678. Cross-checked grep for all Wen-ADW occurrences across paper_draft.tex (lines 176, 467, 895, 900, 903, 935, 1671, 1673, 1677, 1981): all sites now consistently attribute the factor-6000 deficit to the U(1)-string-net-extended-to-gravity channel; the only 'non-Abelian-gauge-symmetry' string remaining is at line 1677 inside the sec 10.2 explanatory parenthetical, which correctly frames it as the structurally-distinct pathway closed separately by gauge erasure (the rhetorical contrast that makes the Wen-channel attribution unambiguous). LaTeX log grep for 'Citation .* undefined' returns 0 hits -- compile clean.

stage10_round_3_verdict.rationale: GREEN per agent-prompt criterion (0 BLOCKERs). The single round-2 BLOCKER F-r2-block-1 (§2.1 falsified-register Wen-ADW non-Abelian mislabel + wrong D3 section reference) is CLOSED at r3 by the commit `701e928` single-line patch. F line 176-178 now reads 'the Wen--ADW factor-$6000$ deficit closing the emergent-$U(1)$-string-net-extended-to-gravity channel of Wen (D3 \S 4)' -- both the channel-attribution flip and the D3 section flip are present, mirroring the round-2-corrected §10.2 entry character-for-character (modulo the rhetorical voice difference between a §2.1 abstract-bullet entry and the §10.2 substrate-register table entry with explanatory parenthetical). Cross-grep confirms the only remaining 'non-Abelian-gauge-symmetry' string in paper_draft.tex is at line 1677 inside the §10.2 explanatory parenthetical, which is the correct rhetorical contrast (the structurally-distinct pathway closed separately by gauge erasure). Cross-check against F sec 6.2 closure-2 paragraph at line 895 ('Closure 2: Perturbative Wen-ADW deficit (D3 \S 4)') confirms internal consistency. LaTeX log clean (`grep 'Citation .* undefined' paper_draft.log` = 0 hits). All r1+r2 closed BLOCKERs and 4 closed advisories carry forward; 2 advisories (F-r1-adv-5 sec 11 length compression, F-r1-adv-6 E.4-prime designator drift) remain non-blocking and carry forward to Stage 13.
stage10_round_3_verdict.next_round_gate: F bundle is CLEAR for Stage 13 adversarial review. No Stage-10 round 4 needed. Stage 13 should pick up the 2 carried-forward advisories (sec 11 Phase 8 outlook compression + E.4 vs E.4-prime designator).
